zh.Hanley Castle, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾亨利 卡素

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon於1465年12月出生在英國波克夏亞頓登時，他的父親Sir William Norreys24歲，母親Joan de Vere25歲。他和Frideswide Lovel至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1491年6月5日在英國波克夏布雷享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon于1465年12月出生在英国波克夏亞頓登时，他的父亲Sir William Norreys24岁，母亲Joan de Vere25岁。他和Frideswide Lovel至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1491年6月5日在英国波克夏布雷享年25岁。

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon was born in December 1465, in Yattendon, Berkshire, England, his father, Sir William Norreys, was 24 and his mother, Joan de Vere, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Frideswide Lovel. He died on 5 June 1491, in Bray, Berkshire, England, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon est né en décembre 1465, à Yattendon, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Norreys, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan de Vere, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Frideswide Lovel. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1491, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon im Dezember 1465 in Yattendon, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Norreys 24 und seine Mutter Joan de Vere 25. Er hatte mit Frideswide Lovel mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1491 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Bray, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon è nato il nel dicembre 1465 nel Yattendon, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Norreys, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Vere, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Frideswide Lovel. Morì il 5 giugno 1491, nel Bray, Berkshire, England, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendonが1465年12月にイギリスバークシュアイアヤッテンドンで生まれた時，父Sir William Norreysは24歳，母Joan de Vereは25歳であった。彼はFrideswide Lovelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1491年6月5日にイギリスバークシュアイアブレイで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon(이)가 1465년 12월 영국 버크실르 야텐던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Norreys(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Vere(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Frideswide Lovel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1491년 6월 5일 영국 버크실르 브라이에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon nasceu em dezembro de 1465, em Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Norreys, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Vere, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Frideswide Lovel. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1491, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon родился декабрь 1465 г. в местности яттендон, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Norreys было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Vere, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Frideswide Lovel. Он умер 5 июня 1491 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Norreys Baron Of Yattendon nació en diciembre de 1465, en Yattendon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Norreys, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan de Vere, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Frideswide Lovel. Murió el 5 de junio de 1491, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 25 años.
